name: Vegetable Pizza
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Hidden Valley Ranch salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the Crescent rolls into a pizza pan.
2. Bake for 7-10 minutes, or until golden brown.
3. Mix softened cream cheese with mayonnaise and dried salad dressing.
4. Spread the cream cheese mixture on the cooked dough.
5. Top with vegetables and cheese.
6. Press down lightly.
7. Chill for at least 1 hour.
8. Cut into pieces.
